## 📝 Description

## 🧪 Testing Strategy

- [ ] Unit tests passed locally
- [ ] Verified build succeeds with `task installer:build` and `task installer:build`
- [ ] Verified `Services.msc` integration functions properly
- [ ] Manual and visual tests for TUI exclusivity logic (if applicable)

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style (ran `gofmt` / `golangci-lint`)
- [ ] Self-reviewed code
- [ ] TUI exclusivity logic remains intact (no conflicting services)
- [ ] No new meaningful warnings generated
